_publications._publicationTitle: Image segmentation of plexiform neurofibromas from a deep neural network using multiple b-value diffusion data.

_contextSnippet: All IVIM modeling showed a very high degree of fit across the three time points studied for normal (non-tumor; R = 0.999 ± 0.0001, 0.999 ± 0.0002, 0.998 ± 0.0002) and PN tumors (R² = 0.999 ± 0.0001, 0.999 ± 0.0004, 0.998 ± 0.0005).
details: Successfully acquired multiple b-value diffusion data for IVIM modeling with very high degree of fit (R² = 0.998-0.999) across three time points for both normal and tumor tissue
